title: Production of Full-Length Ski Film + IRL Event
description:
# Production of Full-Length Ski Film + IRL Event

We're producing a full-length film during the upcoming Winter season that will cover all aspects of skiing, from pow to Street skiing. Part of which will be at Rusutsu Resort in Hokkaido, Japan, featuring the first ever Gnars snow opstacles.

We're proposing a dual ask from both Alps and Gnars to help support the initiative.

## Description

Utah-based professional free-skiers, Bennie Osnow and Seamus Flanagan will be traveling the world, seeking the best of the best in terms of terrain and conditions.

![Bennie Osnow Log Backflip Submission - Traveling Circus](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SyRzYtiUp.jpg)




One confirmed location is Rusutsu Resort in Hokkaido, Japan - where Nouns proposal 218 is currently being carried out. We aim to spend time at the resort, capturing the Nouns activation with Alps, along with what the area is renowned for: deep, pristine powder.

We're collaborating with the team working at Rusutsu on a gnarly event - an "expression session", for which we've already secured sponsors that will provide gear to give away.

Sponsors include companies like Line Skis, Armada Skis, Jiberish, Wells Lamont, and Day Maker Touring Bindings. These companies boast a combined Instagram following of over 600,000 followers.

We'll be enhancing the existing activation plans by offering more pro skiiers displaying their talent, ride together time, and the chance to win gear provided by sponsors, plus filming the whole event.

We'll also create a separate, captivating video that can be posted on Gnars youtube. This video will be dedicated to the activation, much like the one previously produced for Gnars, but this one showing how 3 intertwined onchain communities (Nouns, Gnars & Alps) can come together and do something amazing. We aim to illustrate how joining these onchain communities can empower people to do what they love.

We're working with an acclaimed videographer, and have partnered with Level 1 Productions for film distribution.

Level 1 Productions is a renowned ski film production company, with a large following and a history of producing award-winning films. They have a combined social media following of over 310,000 followers, and their films are distributed worldwide with an annual reach of over 24 million people. They also have a movie premeire tour where they go all over presenting some of the best movies from the season prior.![IMG_7011](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SkX0otsUp.jpg)


## The Ask


We've already secured:
- Sponsors providing gear for giveaways and prizes
- Rusutsu providing accommodation, lift passes and airport transfers
- 1.5 ETH from the existing activation budget (Nouns prop 218)

And we're asking for:
- 1.5 ETH from Alps
- $3,500 USDC from Gnars

We believe that collaboration between these communites and the resort is a powerful combination to bring more awareness and understanding about what it means to be "onchain" to the snow-sports culture.

This funding and sponsorship will further help cover our crew's travel costs, accommodations (outside of Rusutsu), and will empower us to dedicate our entire winter to filming this project, ensuring the highest quality end product that will reach and inspire thousands of passionate skiers and snow-sports enthusiasts.





![IMG_0159](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJ6R3YsU6.jpg)

## Deliverables

- Title sponsorship of the feature-length film with Nouns, Gnars & Alps logos, which will be posted on Level 1's Youtube.
- Parts in the film featuring Nouns, Gnars & Alps at Rusutsu.
- A dedicated video about the Rusutsu trip specifically, featuring the Giant Noggles and the 2 terrain park opstacles - the first snow opstacles in the world. A testament to bringing more shredders onchain.
- IRL event collab at Rusutsu Resort, Japan.
- Continue to tag Gnars in social media posts.
![Screen Shot 2023-12-16 at 1.56.07 PM](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkExRYi86.png)
The snow opstacles that we will get footage on at Rusutsu.
![Screen Shot 2023-12-16 at 1.55.56 PM](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/H1bbCYjLa.png)

To get a sense of our previous work, here are some of the most popular projects we've been a part of:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gcyb4ydUlRs&t=34s

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=osP1LFt_yes&t=428s

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-m0qEJq_WfI&t=950s

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FzX5RXZP2T8&t=627s

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qbfDZeAL6C0

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DowT56Bo0Wk&t=316s


Additionally, here's an edit I created for Gnars last winter:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r7MvfaIHrV4

## Thank You

A huge thank you to everyone involved so far! We hope to have everyone on board.
Thank you for taking the time to consider this proposal.

title: Establish the Community Pod
description:
# Establish the Community Pod

# Establish the Community Pod

## Introduction

The essence of Gnars DAO lies in its community. The energy, passion, and dedication of our members have been the driving force behind our success. As we grow, it’s crucial to maintain this spirit, making sure each member feels integral and heard. 

Investing in the formalization and operations of the Community Pod is investing in our collective future. This team will spearhead onboarding, community events, Gnars Jam Sessions, and weekly newsletters, enhancing our social media footprint to expand the Gnars family. This initiative promises a more dynamic and engaging experience for every Gnars member.

We propose establishing the Community Pod and its core infrastructure, then focusing on specific initiatives rather than broad overarching funding. This strategy sets a standard for future pods and allows for targeted funding of core community activities as detailed below, with subsequent initiatives being proposed individually, granting the community greater influence over the pod’s direction and focus areas.

---
## The Community So Far & Moving Forward

Until now, the Gnars community's efforts have yielded impressive results. The formation of the Community Pod marks a shift towards greater efficiency and targeted impact. Members can anticipate more regular and focused community engagements, as we streamline our efforts to enrich the Gnars experience.

Moving forward, our goals are clear: 
- Achieve increased engagement rates on our community calls, shows, and media platforms.
- Foster growth in followers and engagement on our social platforms, expanding our community's reach and influence.
- Enable new community members to get up to speed quickly
- Create and execute a content calendar for social media to ensure consistent and strategic messaging that aligns with Gnars DAO's mission and values.
- Establish regular processes, including feedback and reporting mechanisms, to gather insights and improve community initiatives.

---

### Our Team

Our team members, many actively involved since the inception of Gnars, have showcased their capability and dedication to Gnars over the past year and a half. Below is the team that will initially be eligible to submit for the bi-weekly retroactive funding rounds for this term of the community pod. New members will be accepted on a rolling basis.

* Gami
* Satori
* Benbodhi
* Vlad
* Davin
* Xargs
* Brett
* Gnarly Professor
* Akva
* Jasper
* Knowhow
* Luiz Hadad
* Mari
* Overhaul
* Wylin

### Meetings

We will stick to a regular schedule of meetings, but prioritize asynchronous work. We want to have as much in writing as possible, so future members can come along and follow our thought processes and rationale for decisions we have made. A general outline of our meetings is found in the scope of work below. The final schedule will be determined in the first Pod meeting.

### Documentation

Processes will be documented for creating agendas, hosting meetings, creating and scheduling social media posts, etc as well as keeping records of work that has been completed. These processes will be established by the Pod and published by the end of the first month of this term.

### Proposal Critique

A reoccurring issue in DAOs is the inability to receive actionable feedback before submitting a proposal onchain. The Community Pod will also commit to providing feedback on proposal ideas and drafts posted in Discord prior to being submitted. 

### Feedback

We value our community's voice. Monthly surveys will be conducted prior to our internal reviews to ensure we remain aligned with community interests. These regular feedback and review cycles will allow us to adjust our strategies based on performance metrics and community feedback.

### Contingency

A small amount of funds have been allocated for gas costs and unknown costs that may arise over the proposed 3-month term. 

---

## Scope of Work

* **Community Events**
    * Weekly Call Schedule: For general discussions, community member onboarding/educational talks, and proposal ideation and creation (to be determined by the Pod)
    * Proposal Discussion Call: Strictly for discussion of active proposals, weekly as needed
    * Bi-weekly Team Call: For team coordination, reviews, and report preparation
    * Agendas, recordings, and summaries of all meetings
* **Social Media Management**
    * Content Creation: Tweets and threads only, including the breakdown of the newsletter, as well as scheduling and posting.
        * Note: Instagram posts/reels, Tiktoks, short clips, or edits of Gnars athlete content will fall under the Media Pod's responsibilities.
    * Reposting clips from That's Gnarly and other content from Gnars athletes to: Instagram, Tiktok, X, Reddit
* **Feedback**
    * Community Feedback: An anonymous monthly survey for the community to give uninhibited feedback on our progress

---
## Source the Construction of Noggles Opstacles Around the Globe

To ensure we continue on our mission of noggles opstacles all over the world, we will commit to seeking out 2 new locations for new installations during this 3-month term. Each installation will require its own proposal, or we may seek to fund these through other methods such as Prop House rounds. The Pod will determine which route we want to take at our first meeting. 

---

## Retroactive Allocation

As thanks to the community members who have been generous enough to commit their time to onboarding athletes, creating educational materials, improving the Discord experience, hosting the Daily Drop and Gnars Jam Session shows, etc, I am proposing that we allocate 20 Gnars and $3,000 USDC to be distributed in a single coordinape style retroactive funding round. It's not as much as they deserve, but we must be conscientious of the fact that we need to be more conservative with funds moving forward.

Any Gnars member who is currently a member of the pod will be eligible to submit a report with work they have completed over the past year, and the Board will vote on distributing the funds accordingly. A snapshot has already been taken of existing pod members and will be used to verify member eligibility.

---

## Budget

| Item                                          | USDC          |     #      | Subtotal    |
|-----------------------------------------------|---------------|------------|-------------|
| Socials Management (per week)                 | $300       |  **x12**             |  =$3,600   |
| Community Calls (per week)                       | $150       |  **x12**           |   =$1,800   |
| Admin (per week)                                     | $150       |  **x12**             |   =$1,800   |
| Contingency, gas, etc (per week)              | $75        |  **x12**             |   =$900     |
| Retro Fund                                                  | $3,000     |  **x1**             |  =$3,000   |   
| **Total**                                                       |               |            |**$11,100**|

---

### Summary of transactions

$11,100 USDC and 20 Gnars to the Community Pod Party at social.gnars.eth (0x034b8F73cCfa175466fD7a9450901DD8eebff8d1)

_Note: The 20 Gnars will come from the multi-sig therefore cannot be attached as an onchain transaction_

title: Proposal for Collaboration with Alps/Gnars
description:
# Proposal for Collaboration with Alps/Gnars

## Introduction
I’m ***Kai Ujejski***, a pro snowboarder based in Vancouver,BC Canada. With over 16 years of experience in the snowboard industry not only riding but also video editing and marketing. I've worked with brands such as Adidas, Woodward and Guru Energy Drink and I have pro model merchandise that is carried in ski and snowboard shops across the globe such as my Salmon Arms signature mitten. I've inspired WEB3/Crypto themed graphics in other WEB2 brands such as last seasons snowboard graphic "[The  Cryptorat](https://www.instagram.com/p/CjO9Lfjrlxq/?img_index=1)" for DWD Snowboards most popular snowboard model. I received Transworld/Snowboarder Magazines top 10 most progressive tricks of 2017 and have been featured in countless posts on all major snowboard media outlets throughout my career. I'm enthusiastic about collaborating with Gnars/Alps to bring more shredders onchain, more attention to the brand and showcase all the amazing stuff that is being built here.
![IMG_2145](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Hky5_g3Ua.jpg)






***GNARS Track Record of previous prop:***
- Made a street snowboarding full video part with a Gnars Logo as the first logo in the video, it was featured on all of the major snowboard media outlets. (Snowboard Canada, King Snow Magazine, MethodMag, Slush Magazine) The video was also featured across my socials and major snowboard brands social media accounts and youtube channels. (bringing in over 100k impressions/views across platforms) 
- Hosted a Live Premiere Event for the video at one of Vancouver’s most notable venues “Fortune Sound Club'' with over 300 people showing up to the event. I gave away a brand new DWD CryptoRat Snowboard and over $1000 of merchandise. Gave a speech before the film speaking about Gnars and how the DAO funded the project, closing out the night with a live performance of my music including the song I made for the video.
- Had an entire [article/feature write up in Snowboard Canada](https://snowboardcanada.com/32-bone-crusher-x-m3thaverse-vancouver-premiere/) that specifically talks about Gnars and how the DAO supported the project with funding. 
- Posted 10+ Pieces of Content on Thatsgnarly and promoted the use of thatsgnarly including the [first piece of snowboard content on ThatsGnarly which was also selected as the Weekly Community Drop](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/creations/m3th-at-grouse) in addition to [content selected for the #2 Alpine Collab Drop](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/collab/2)
- Onboarded fellow Pro Snowboarder Freddy Perry (d_orklo). Who also had [content](https://thatsgnar.ly/creations/mattress-bounce) featured in the #2 Alpine Collab Drop on ThatsGnarly.
- Put Gnars on the radar of countless industry moguls such as other pro riders and brand owners, (Owners of: Dinosaurs Will Die Snowboards, Ashbury Eyewear, Salmon Arms Gloves, Timebomb Trading, Fortune Sound Club and Major Distributors for Stance Socks.)  Having these people see continued support from Gnars will solidify the DAO as a reliable brand to them which can lead to onboarding them and many others in the snowboard industry. (as well as countless other winter sports enthusiasts) 
- Edited the "Extremely Nounish" Gnars proposal video for Nouns DAO requesting additional funding for the DAO which was also minted over 2000 times!

![gnarshackmd](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJmhZZ2LT.jpg)


## Social Media Content Plan
With the goal of bringing as many new shredders onchain as possible, I plan to consistently release weekly content on social media for 6 consecutive months from December 2023 to May 2024. Not only on my social medias which bring in on average 100k monthly impressions (sometimes way more) but also all of my sponsors social medias (Dinosaurs Will Die Snowboards, Union Binding Co, Stance Socks, Salmon Arms Gloves, Ashbury Eyewear & Nolan Apparel) as well as countless mainstream snowboard media outlets such as Method Magazine, Slush Magazine, Snowboard Canada & King Snow, to name a few. I’ve racked up a plethora of posts with hundreds of thousands of views on individual posts with some reaching nearly two millions plays on a single video. Additionally I will list Gnars/Alps as one of my supporters, and market the brand via product placement (such as having branded logo stickers on my boards). Getting this many eyes on Gnars/Alps in such an ideal target audience will bring a huge level of awareness to the brand and help grow the ecosystem greatly.






### Analytics
- ***TikTok Monthly Analytics (@ratickle)*** 

![tiktokanalyticsforhackmd](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/B1BDKg3Ip.jpg)


- ***Instagram (@m3th) engagement analytics (Monthly on Left / Weekly on Right)***

![iganalyticsforhackmd](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BknvFlhUT.jpg)


***Links to my Tiktok & Instagram:***

https://www.tiktok.com/@ratickle

https://www.instagram.com/m3th/ 


***Additional Links to Some Posts Featuring Me on Prominent Snowboard Publications:***

https://www.snowboarder.com/search?query=kai+ujejski

https://www.snowboarder.com/videos/the-top-10-most-progressive-best-snowboard-tricks-of-2016

https://www.methodmag.com/search_results/?q=kai%20ujejski&page=1

https://kingsnowboard.com/blogs/news-1/stairsmasters-2016?_pos=5&_sid=3d00f8ccb&_ss=r

https://kingsnowboard.com/blogs/video/the-ridge-project-video-photo-recap?_pos=2&_sid=3d00f8ccb&_ss=r










## Events and Community Building
I’ll also be organizing two in-person events of my own at local resorts Mt.Seymour and Grouse Mountain. They will be rail jams and expression sessions with Gnars/Alps branding and product giveaways with prizes such as new snowboards, bindings and all sorts of gear from all of my other sponsors (totalling over $2000 in giveaways). Hosting events is a great way to get everyone in the community involved, spread the word about Gnars/Alps and get more shredders onchain. Not only will these events be great for community building and targeting a diverse demographic of all age groups but they will also get all of the other brands that are involved with these events to look into Gnars/Alps such as the resorts that are hosting the events as well as local shops. IRL events also lend well to showing people in person, how to get involved in the community, whether minting their videos/photos or bidding on tokens to participate in governance. In addition to these two in person events that I’ll be hosting I will also host an online contest for most creative/best trick presented by Gnars/Alps DAO giving users two weeks to film their submissions and have them follow/tag Gnars on socials as well as encourage everyone that enters to share their submissions on Zora (using the Gnars sign up link) and ThatsGnarly. Thus cross promoting the DAO across different social medias and bringing attention not only to the DAO’s but also the Zora Network, ThatsGnarly and the limitless onchain experience for shredders as a whole. This will bring in an even more diverse demographic of people on a significantly larger scale.
![Kairainbow2squareforhackmd](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkWgcehL6.jpg)









## Industry Networking
In addition to hosting my own events I’ll be Traveling to key industry meetups and invite-only events such as Snowboy Productions “Holy Bowly” (spring 2024), “The Projects” (January 9-13, 2024) and Redbull Heavy Metal Railjam (February 2024) as well as any others that come up during the season! (most invites for these events are sent out only a week or two in advance, such as “The Projects” which I received the dates and my invitation for only a few days ago). These major events are another great source of outlets where I'll be able to spread the word about Gnars/Alps to major industry figures by sharing how they can get onchain and earn from their creations by posting them on ThatsGnarly and Zora as well as create their own proposals. This will pose an amazing opportunity to network with and onboard so many more key players from the snowboard industry while they’re all gathered together, ranging from other professional athletes to well established filmers/photographers, brand owners, event organizers, writers from magazines, etc… Throughout the season I would like to give out a couple of Gnars to help onboard a few ideal candidates that I think would be greatly beneficial to the DAO. As I mentioned earlier I will always have Gnars/Alps branded stickers on my boards to maximize product placement in all of the recap videos of these events as well as my own videos and social posts. [(last year's recap video of “The Projects” has 41k views on their Youtube - including a section of my footage)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w5ZOlQ2ripE&ab_channel=SnowboyProductions ) 

## Travel and Content Creation
 Not only will I be traveling to these essential industry events I’ll be traveling to other resorts all across the continent to keep the social media content interesting for viewers and to expand the audience that will be viewing said content all while promoting Gnars/Alps and actively getting as many new shredders onchain as humanly possible. I will also be working on a longer term full video part project that will be filmed in urban environments throughout different cities with a skate-influenced approach to snowboarding. Since I’m not able to predict the weather patterns ahead of time for both of these offerings I will be traveling to locations to film wherever the snow conditions are ideal, requiring quick planning and decision making which is an inescapable part of winter sports. Filming a video part is an essential part of the snowboard scene (you could think of it like a resume for a snowboarder) that will help legitimize Gnars/Alps in the eyes of snow sports industry moguls. I would list Gnars/Alps as an official sponsor for this project and include a logo in the video as well as having branded logo stickers on my boards.
![holy bowly day 5 2-2 for hackmd](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJUG2lhLT.jpg)




## Funding Request


To fulfill the outlined plans, I am requesting support from both Alps & Gnars communities and see this as a great way to show the synergy and also lessen the burden on either treasury.
I am asking for:
- **1.5 ETH** from Alps
- **3 Gnars** (to give away/onboard some ideal candidates)
- **8000 USDC** from Gnars

These funds will help cover expenses such as travel costs, accommodation, payment for filmers, payment for photographers and the costs associated with setting up/organizing my events. I am able to offset a large portion of expenses by submitting my own proposals directly to resorts for free lift tickets and am provided all my snowboard gear from my other sponsors who also help subsidize some of my other costs which is ultimately what will make all of this possible with 8k from Gnars.
![Kai Lifey on phone through fence for hackmd](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJ172ehLT.jpg)




## Breakdown of costs:


***Travel to “The Projects” in January 2024***

Flight: $500 

Bus (if I bus 3 hours from the airport instead of flying to the another airport my flight is half the price): $50

Food for the week: $150

Accommodation for 6 nights: $500


***Travel to “Red Bull Heavy Metal Rail Jam in February 2024***

Flight: $450

Accommodation for 3 nights: $350

Additional travel costs (baggage/food/bus): $200


***Travel to “Holy Bowly” Spring 2024***

Gas/Flight (location unknown until closer to the event)

Accommodation for 7 Days

Food for the week

Additional Travel Expenses (baggage/public transport/etc)

Total expenses will be similar to that of “The Projects”

***Content Creation Expenses***

Gas to drive to and from resorts to film content for 6 consecutive months: 
25$+ per day - ~ 5 days a week - for 6 months = $3000 


Partial Coverage of Expenses for travelling to new resorts across the continent and filming for longer term video part project:

Gas/flights: $500+

Accommodation for multiple weeks: $700




Partial Payment for Filmers/Photographers/Editing: $1200

Expenses marked as "partial" will be subsidized either out of my pocket or by my sponsors. 
(In addition to the plethora of additional costs I haven't mentioned in this prop)

Thank you for considering this proposal. Your support will significantly contribute to the growth of Gnars, Alps and the broader snowboarding community.
**Thank you, much love,**
**Kai**

description:
# Help Minnesota Ripper Fix His Jaw

|![](https://images.hive.blog/0x0/https://files.peakd.com/file/peakd-hive/web-gnar/245n3NgAHLG5REq7AifLrfSoXJX7uMjRngCMBCquTEBJZtKjpBsXDdNnRr54KA5JVrUJC.gif) | ![](https://images.hive.blog/0x0/https://files.peakd.com/file/peakd-hive/web-gnar/Eokd8HrEV7TgTdfvCtqP7GdWntUpfV86dG17bTt6argBQEAoy1sdnT4vCdDRU3pnAhP.gif) |
|-|-|

Elevate [@fatherfiger](https://www.instagram.com/fatherfiger/) - Grady Moquin
---


Grady Moquin is a 30 year old skateboarder from Minnesota. He is a friend of [@web-gnar](https://www.gnars.wtf/dao/proposals/11). He was recently attacked in a bar where his jaw was broken. His jaw is wired shut and he can not work for 2 months. This man does not come from money and his folks have created a Go-Fund-Me to help them take care of Grady. Grady rips at skateboarding and works a full time job to support his life.

The dude is between a rock and a hard spot and needs a little touch from a Gnars angel. 😇
Let's uplift him with our DAO! Lets show him that miracles are possible! Lets make an impact in the Minnesota skate scene!

This proposal aims to make  Gnars Dao a donor to his Go Fund Me,  involving @web-gnar making a Go-Fund-Me account with the name: GNARS DAO. The funds would be sent to @web-gnar-- who would then, send them to Grady's Go-Fund-Me.

We want Gnars Dao on the top of his contributors. So we have to donate more than $500. To get this done, the USD ask is $650 to cover the gas costs. The remaining will be sent to the Go-Fund-Me.

title: Proposal for Collaboration with Alps/Gnars
description:
# Proposal for Collaboration with Alps/Gnars

## Introduction
I’m ***Kai Ujejski***, a professional snowboarder based in Vancouver, BC, Canada.

With over 16 years of experience in the snowboard industry, I bring expertise in riding, video editing, and marketing.

I'm enthusiastic about collaborating with both Alps & Gnars to bring more shredders onchain, more attention to the brands and showcase all the amazing stuff that is being built here.

![Kai-Rail](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryeHokkL6.jpg)

## Social Media Content Plan
I plan to consistently release weekly content on social media for 6 consecutive months from December 2023 to May 2024. Not only on my social medias, which bring in on average 100k monthly impressions (sometimes way more), but also all of my sponsors social medias (Dinosaurs Will Die Snowboards, Union Binding Co, Stance Socks, Salmon Arms Gloves, Ashbury Eyewear & Nolan Apparel).

I'll also get write ups and features in countless mainstream snowboard media outlets such as Method Magazine, Slush Magazine, Snowboard Canada & King Snow. I will list both Alps & Gnars as sponsors, and market the brands via product placement (such as having branded logo stickers on my boards).

Getting this many eyes on Alps & Gnars in such an ideal target audience will bring a huge level of awareness to the community and help grow the ecosystem greatly.

### Analytics
**TikTok Monthly Analytics:** (@ratickle)

![tiktokanalytics](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rymDfeyL6.jpg)

**Instagram (@m3th) Engagement Analytics:**
Monthly on Left / Weekly on Right

![iganalytics](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rywIHg1La.jpg)

## Events and Community Building
I’ll also be organizing events like railjams and expression sessions with Alps/Gnars branding and product giveaways/prizes such as new snowboards, bindings and all sorts of gear from all of my sponsors.

Hosting events is a great way to get everyone in the community involved and spread the word about Alps/Gnars. Not only will these events be great for community building and targeting a diverse demographic of all age groups but they will also get the other brands that are involved with these events to look into Alps/Gnars such as the resorts that are hosting the events as well as local shops.

IRL events also lend well to showing people in person, how to get involved in the community, whether minting their videos/photos or bidding on tokens to participate in governance.

![Kairainbow2square](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/r1HdLe1Ia.jpg)

## Industry Networking
I'll be traveling to key industry meetups and invite-only events such as Snowboy Productions “Holy Bowly” which are a great source of outlets where I'll be able to spread the word about Alps/Gnars to major industry figures.

These events pose an amazing opportunity to network with and onboard so many key players from the snowboard industry while they’re all gathered together. The demographic ranges from other professional athletes to well established filmers/photographers, brand owners, event organizers, writers from magazines and the list goes on.

![holy bowly day 5 2-2](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BygQfve1UT.jpg)

## Travel and Content Creation
In addition to traveling to these essential industry events I’ll be traveling to other resorts to keep the social media content interesting for viewers and to expand the audience that will be viewing said content.

I will also be working on a longer term, full video part project that will be filmed in urban environments throughout different cities, with a skate-influenced approach to snowboarding. Filming a video part is an essential part of the snowboard scene (you could think of it like a resume for a snowboarder) that will help legitimize Alps/Gnars in the eyes of industry moguls.

I'll list both Alps & Gnars as official sponsors for this project and include logos in the video.

![Kai Lifey on phone through fence](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJcGugkUT.jpg)

## Funding Request
To fulfill the outlined plans, I am requesting support from both Alps & Gnars communities and see this as a great way to show the synergy and also lessen the burden on either treasury.

I am asking for:
- **1.5 ETH** from Alps
- **8000 USDC** from Gnars

These funds will cover expenses such as travel costs, accommodation, payment for filmers, and the costs associated with setting up/organizing events.

Thank you for considering this proposal. Your support will significantly contribute to the growth of Alps/Gnars and the broader snowboarding community.

**Thank you, much love,**
**Kai**

title: Luiz Hadad renewal proposal (Surfer)
description:
# Luiz Hadad renewal proposal (Surfer)

**Renewal proposal for Luiz Hadad (surfer)**
![](https://i.imgur.com/boT4gbw.png)
Trying to impersonate the Wavehead NFT I was gifted when joined gnars :)


![](https://i.imgur.com/pBcFRGo.png)

## **TL;DR**



Intro; Highlights from sponsorship term and travel grant; Defining Success for shredders on Gnars season 2; Content production; Community Building & Public Goods; Measurable Objectives;  Use of funds: 6.200 USDC for 6 months + 1k USDC for Public Goods; Total 7.200 USDC

## **About me**

Aloha guys, I am Luiz Hadad, brazilian, 34 years old, have been collaborating with Gnars as a [Surfer since September 2022](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x4b0fef8be71a1beae3d7d2b31d44ee2df2ca539b36aa66a8221b346f6a713c4a). I became a member of the #pod-community in 2023 and I've been helping build our community into extreme water sports. I also got a [Gnarly travel grant in July to go to Indonesia](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x30847f96110952ed83c1aa78c09b5cc11ef1076614560efd29de73e8b9b18894).

I joined the crypto world in 2017, and since then I've been working as a community builder in different projects, such as  [Cambiatus](https://www.cambiatus.com/) and [Muda](www.mudaoutraseconomias.com). I founded [SurfHive](https://www.peakd.com/c/hive-141964/created) and participate as a partner and advisor at [Surfguru](https://www.surfguru.com.br/), [Play4Change](https://www.play4change.io/) and [Kanna](https://www.kannacoin.io/).


![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SyzY79tN3.jpg)
Lucas Rocha (@lrocha94), Myself, Mari (@marinioac), Gibson (@3rdeye_crypto) and Vlad (@xvlad) at the Gnars Session during Ethereum Rio 2023.


[Surfguru](https://www.surfguru.com.br) is Brazil's biggest online surfing community and forecast website, with 300k unique users and 2.5M visits per month. I co-lead the web3 movement there with @marinioac and @crisciacm. In 2022 we launched [SurfHive](https://www.peakd.com/c/hive-141964/created), a community inspired by [SkateHive](https://peakd.com/c/hive-173115/created) (special thanks to Vlad and the SkateHive crew) and [Surflimpo](https://www.cambiatus.com/surflimpo), a social currency that incentivize people [taking care of the oceans and participating in beach cleanups](https://surflimpo.cambiatus.io/invite/5w2AoW). 

We approved a prop with Gnars [to create educational content, help onboard surfers that can be NFT holders or shredders and raise awareness about Gnars. ](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x9e670758685c096b923e0b9fa65e2e9cd44906983ea78fe73d750d77be7c568c)

Gnars and Surfguru are projects that converge web3 and surfing - two of my biggest passions - as you can see on my [Thats Gnarly](https://thatsgnar.ly/luizhadad) page.


During this past year, I believe I represented Gnars in and out of the water, as an athlete and a community builder.

I did a [sponsorship report](https://peakd.com/hive-141964/@luizhadad/6-months-as-a-sponsored-surfer-at-gnars-dao-or-6-meses-como-um-surfista-patrocinado-da-gnars-en-pt-br) from my first 6-months term, and created plenty of content from the trip to Indonesia, most of it posted on [X](https://www.x.com/luizhadad), [instagram](https://www.instagram.com/luizhadad) and [Thats Gnarly](https://thatsgnar.ly/luizhadad), including the the mintable [IndoGnars shortmovie](https://thatsgnar.ly/surfguru/stories/surfguru-3-074794) which was a deliverable from the [Travel Grant](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x30847f96110952ed83c1aa78c09b5cc11ef1076614560efd29de73e8b9b18894).  

I'd love to keep collaborating with Gnars as a sponsored surfer and a member of the #pod-community, with community building activities.

**Here goes few highlights from the [sponsorship term](https://peakd.com/hive-141964/@luizhadad/6-months-as-a-sponsored-surfer-at-gnars-dao-or-6-meses-como-um-surfista-patrocinado-da-gnars-en-pt-br) and the [ travel grant ](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x30847f96110952ed83c1aa78c09b5cc11ef1076614560efd29de73e8b9b18894):**

## **Content Creation**

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Skvt1ZVI3.jpg)
- Surfing content in gnarly waves, such as slabs and barrels, in Espirito Santo, Saquarema, Fernando de Noronha and Indonesia; This content became part of few Gnars videos, including the [first surfing/water sports mint on That's Gnarly](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/mint/0x8ece8f98f17d8f922c1d3eda16a0eeb8065728de). All content produced is available for Gnars using as it wishes.

![gland-compressed-prop-renewal.jpeg](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJQR1nBXa.jpg)

[**Recording IndoGNARS in Indonesia - July & August 2023:** Surfing gnarly reefbreaks in the Mentawaii Islands, G-Land, Bali and Desert Point with Thiago Okazuka as the main video maker.](https://thatsgnar.ly/surfguru/stories/surfguru-3-074794)

**The IndoGNARS movie has minting available until August 2024 and 30% goes back to Gnars treasury**

![IMG_8895.JPG](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/S1QZQ3Bma.jpg)



##  **Events and Conferences**
 
 During 2023 I was fortunate to receive invitations to speak at the major conferences in Brazil, and even a online conference from Peru. At every conference I was using Gnarly merch and  mentioned Gnars in my speech.
**- NFT Brasil at the panel NFTs and the Future of Sports** with my fellow Gnars shredder  Vlad (June 2023);


![NFT-Brasil-Luiz-Vlad.jpeg](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BJsDp2BX6.jpg)


**- ESX (Espirito Santo Innovation Experience)** at the panel about How to enhance brands with web3 (June 2023);

![ESX-web3-2023.JPG](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJ5Ah2BQp.jpg)


**- Organized 2 beach cleanups (June and October 2023)**, engaging the surfing community around it - In June it was World Oceans Day and we got some TV coverage.

![Limpeza-de-Praias-Gnars.jpeg](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HydxC2BXp.jpg)



**- Representing Gnars at the Rio Blockchain Conference (September 2023):** 
I was the ReFi content curator and hosted couple panels - one of them with Bob Burnquist, Taynaah Reis, Ana Leme and Vinicius Rocha.


![BlockchainRio-Festival-ReFi-Panel.jpeg](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJ3AInSma.jpg)

- Spreading the word about Gnars as a speaker during the Ethereum Rio Conference and 3 meetups at WeBelieve Hub;

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJFokZVIh.jpg)

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkaTkbV8n.jpg)
- Running a DAO Governance Workshop at Ethereum Rio and showcasing Gnars as the major example;


## **Other Community Building efforts** 

- Participated actively on building the [Shredders Journey](https://app.timesnap.xyz/gnars/events)  

- Participated on the prop 382 aka "Bring a million shredders onchain" as a reviewer and at the Notable Contributions section

![Screenshot 2023-11-06 at 09.34.20.png](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/S1LO6LIQp.png)


- Onboarded gnarly members: Mari (@marinioac), Lucas Rocha, Bernardo Nassar, Carlos Bellumat, Criscia Cesconetto, Gabriel Sodré, João Parmagiani (@Zima_ardrp), Felipe and Gabriel Carvalho (Precious plastic ES),  and couple others; 

![SurfguruDAO-HomePage.jpg](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/By06WwLQ6.jpg)



- Building the [SurfguruDAO](https://thatsgnar.ly/surfguru) and [SurfHive](https://peakd.com/c/hive-141964/created) communities: Hosting a weekly call, every wednesday 2pm UTC-3. We focus on onboarding new members and helping them use web3 tools such as: purchasing/bidding on gnars, upload thats gnarly creations,how hive works, applying to Nouns prop.house rounds, hypercerts (for proof of impact), zora and any other new tool than can help us taking care of our beaches, onboarding surfers into the web3 or getting rewards for creating cool content. 
- Starting from zero, we currently have 63 surfers at SurfguruDAO, 82 subscribers and 11 active users at SurfHive.

![Screenshot 2023-11-20 at 16.43.33](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SysWP4FNT.png)


 - Through this initiatives we're able to generate a small revenue to Gnars - through every that's gnarly mint or by choosing Gnars as a default beneficiary at Hive - the DAO will earn at least 5% of the post's rewards, as seen below.

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryTbl-V83.png)

**- Creating partnerships that bring benefits for Gnars holders:** 
    - [Surfguru](https://surfguru.com.br/) - 1 year subscription for all Gnars holders with +2 NFTs and 90 days subscription for all holders.
    - [We Believe Hub](https://webelieve.com.br/) gnars holders can work there 2x a week for free
  
  I believe Gnarly Partnerships are a way in which people can be incentivized to purchase their Gnar NFT (at least in Brazil), and I'll work to develop this area during the next 6 months.


## **Sponsorship proposal**

I will love to continue as a Gnars surfer and community builder. On Gnars season two (2023-2024), I think that a Sponsored Shredder must collaborate on at least three key areas: 

**i) Produce gnarly content;**

**ii) Lead community building efforts such as: hosting events/meetups, onboarding new members, help building tools, create partnerships that will benefit DAO members, and represent the DAO everywhere you go.**

**iii) Create/collaborate on proposals focused on public goods, both on Gnars and Nouns.** In my case, I'll focus on beach regeneration, organizing beach cleanups, creating educational signs with noggles on it and take care of couple beaches in Brazil**

**iv) As I got more familiar with the Nouns Ecosystem, and with the candidate proposals possibility, I'd like to create bigger props for Nouns. If that happens, I commit give back 10% of the raised funds to Gnars DAO treasury, as [@gami's suggestion in March 2023](https://twitter.com/0xigami/status/1632562563639840768)**


## **Nounish content production:**

As a Gnars sponsored surfer, I will **continue to create content** using: 

- Gnars logo at the top of my board and jetski, along with Surfguru as my major sponsors;
![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HynzWWEUn.jpg)
![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkBmZbNL2.jpg)

- Gnars mention on every social media post related to extreme sports, beach cleanups and web3 - also @thatsgnar.ly , #GnarsDAO and #NounsWaves hashtags
- Noggles on my web2 and web3 profile names ⌐◨-◨  (They're already on my [instagram](https://www.instagram.com/luizhadad) and [twitter](https://www.twitter.com/luizhadad))

- Wearing Gnars gear (hats, shirts, glasses, POAP) when going to surf, web3 & tech events, interviews;

- Gnars as my PFP on twitter, discord and telegram;

**On the web3 content side** I can try to post at least once a month a blog post on SurfHive and every two weeks submit a photo or video on That's Gnarly.

Over 6 months (26 weeks), that would mean:
- **6 posts on SurfHive + 13 submissions on That's Gnarly** - **19 pieces of web3 surfing content**

I will contribute with 30% of my earnings on SurfHive and That's Gnarly to Gnars. Gnars is already my default beneficiary on my SurfHive posts.

**Regarding **web2 content**, my deliverables will be:**

- One web2 surfing post per week (minimum) on Instagram mentioning and tagging Gnars, Nounish and That's Gnarly; **That equals 26 posts.** 

- Be active on twitter helping spread nounish content.
- Participate on lives and spaces representing Gnars.

![Screenshot 2023-11-06 at 16.52.58.png](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SJPV4pL7p.png)

            @luizhadad / wavehead



## **Community Building:**

I believe every Gnars community member should try to add value to the DAO as much as they can. With the additional funding from Nouns, Shredders that are asking for sponsorship should also propose community building initiatives that can add value to the DAO, along with content from their shredding life.

On the community building side, I will: 

- Be active on Gnars Discord and on the #pod-community;
- Cocreate, test and give support to the [Shredders Journey](https://app.timesnap.xyz/gnars/events), using it as an onboarding tool and a way to define what Gnars expects from shredders
- Actively onboard new members with online content and IRL events

- Foster partnerships that can bring benefits to Gnars holders. As an extreme sports club, I believe that the more benefits we bring to members, more people will be willing to purchase a Gnar.

  - I am currently in conversations with [Layback Beer](https://layback.com/) - I wanna make a prop to create nouns themed obstacles/ramps on the Layback parks. As part of the partnership, every Gnars holder will get 1 free beer when entering a Layback park - can you imagine that? My favorite one is at [Florianopolis](https://www.instagram.com/lbpark_floripa/)
 


- Organize **3 educational meetups to talk about Gnars** in the six months period. 
    - I'd like to host two events at WeBelieve Hub, in November 2023 and April 2024. I'd also love to host the first web3 meetup in the Fernando de Noronha island either in January or March.
    - The ways to define success of this events are: number os persons attending, number of members onboarded, quality of new members onboarded, new partnerships derived from the event.
    - Photos and videos will be sent afterwards, along with estimated number of atendees and new onboards (either on thats gnarly or in gnars)

## ***Public Goods***

On the Public goods aspects, my initial  focus will be on beach park refurbishments.

My hypothesis is that if we combine the creation of educational signs with beach cleanups and a good communications plan, involving social media posts, after movies, conference presentations and press releases, we can become a study case of how NFTS (Nouns/Gnars) are causing positive impact on the ground.  

The educational signs on the beach parks and beach entrances can be for surfers something similar to what skating obstacles are for skaters. 

I'll ask for a separate budget of 1k USDC, to invest on conserving two different beaches: **Praia da Costa, Vila Velha (where I live) and Regência, Linhares (my second home) both places have amazing waves and a engaged surfing communities**. I believe this could be a way to create a #positive-sum movement. 

I will be talking to local authorities and get permissions to place signs. Then we will select local artists and create nounish art raising environmental awareness to preserve the beach, then use it as educational signs. We will place it at the beach entrances (Regência and Praia da Costa, both in Espirito Santo - my home state).

After that we will be doing beach cleanups, educating the community that goes to the beach and finding ways to distribute tools to preserve our beaches (portable ashtrays & recycled plastic bags, that can be held by Lifesavers and they can distribute it at the beach, for example).

All the signs and tools that we create will have noggles on it ⌐◨-◨

I am in conversations with the Leader of the Lifesavers in Praia da Costa, and the President of Regência Surfing Association, they both loved the idea, but they still need to be onboarded and understand a bit more about us.


## **Planned schedule for 2023/2024:**


**November & December 2023:** 
- Espirito Santo and Rio de Janeiro: **Surfing slabs at home**, doing oceanic fishing and eventually chasing swells in Rio or somewhere down south.

- **IndoGNARS release on a web3 meetup at WeBelieve Hub and create a press release telling the story behind the movie** (how it was created, the relation with web3, how and why Gnars funded it) - I believe this is an inspiring story that will incentivize more people to join Gnars.
- **Beach cleanup in Vila Velha - initiate the refurbishment movement with local surfing association and Lifesavers.**




**January until March 2024:**
- Most of the times I will be in Fernando de Noronha: **creating content and doing community building initiatives** there, such as the first web3 meetup in the island, at new Art Gallery that recently opened.
- I will also work closely with the Lifeguards from the island to create a **"Fernando de Noronha Surfing Guide"**, with tips to avoid accidents and how to see the wave forecast in order to visit places from the island in a safe way. **Gnars will have their logo as a supporter of the Surfguide**.
- **Surf Salva (Surfing Saves)** community engagement. Talking to locals and inviting them to a workshop where we connect Lifeguards with the local surfing community and teaches them how to proceed to save someone from drowning if we have to.
- **Short movie called "Gnarly Vibes"** in Noronha, to showcase the waves and the vibe of this iconic brazilian spot, which is still unknown to foreigners;
- I will cover the WQS Surfing competition for Surfguru, interviewing athletes, talk about the conditions, show the competition backstage and **engage/onboard them into Gnars by making web3 questions from our shredders journey.**



**April & May 2024:** 
- Espirito Santo slabs & Regência (barrels and big waves at home)
- Participate on the Ethereum Rio Conference (April)
- Organize a web3 meetup in Vila Velha after the Ethereum Rio Conference
    - Present at the meetup and create online content to talk about Gnars & the next Crypto Bull Run.
    - Present the IndoGnars and Gnarly Vibes surf videos.


## **All activities will end up being focused on:**
**i) Onboarding new supporters/bidders;
ii) Onboarding surfers and content creators (photographers, video makers, etc);
iii) New mints on That's Gnarly;
iv) New content posted on SurfHive;
v) New proposals that I will make to Nouns will have 10% back to Gnars;
vi) Feedback Loop: As we're learning and iterating, I will be open to receive community feedback and make necessary adjusments to any strategy outlined in the proposal.**



## **Measurable Objectives:**
**i) Onboard 100 supporters, surfers or content creators in 6 months (Gnars or that's gnarly);
ii) Bring at least 33 people to each Gnarly meetup - telling our story to at least 100 people IRL;
iii) Propose and pass at least one prop on Nouns giving back 10% of the funds to Gnars until May 2024;
iv) Test the Public Goods Hypothesis by experimenting it on two beaches in Brazil;
v) Analyze how much revenue can be generated to Gnars from mintable content on a Bull Market context;** 


![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BJL9VWNU3.jpg)

## **Financial proposal**

My ask for the renewal proposal is 6.2k USDC for 6 months. 
This is the equivalent of 0.5 ETH per month with Ethereum prices at around 2k usd.

I would also like to have 1k USDC of resources to invest on Beach Park Refurbishments, and test this hypotesis. If goes well, I could do another prop to take care of other spots.

**My plan is to use the Budget as it follows:**

**Travel costs / Content creation: 4.2k**

500 USD - Plane Ticket for Noronha
600 USD - Electric bike rental ($10 per day for 60 days)
600 USD - Video makers/photographers for gnarly content
250 USD - Boards, stickers and gnarly merch
750 USD - Food for 60 days
1.5k USD - Accommodation for 60 days in Fernando de Noronha (around $750 per month)

**Gnars Community Building: 2k**

1.5k organizing 3 meetups ($500 each for refreshments and venue costs) 
- One meetup in Noronha and two in Vila Velha (my home town)

500 USD - Plane tickets, food and accommodation for Ethereum Rio in April 2024


**Total Sponsorship: $6.200**

**Public Goods: Beach Park Refurbishments**

$500 - Educational Signs (artists & materials)
$100 - Portable ashtrays
$100 - Custom made recyclable plastic bags
$300 - Refreshments and photos/after movie

**Total: $1.000**


**Total Sponsorship + Public Goods = $7.200 USDC**

# Will Will keep building ?

# Will Will keep building ?


|![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/S1J2_ZsEp.png)|
|--|
## TL;DR

Production and distribution of Gnarly Decks while funding and onboarding skateboarding institutions. 


![](https://i.imgur.com/YrhKV8x.png)


## Introduction 

I'm **Will Dias**, based in Brazil - São Paulo and responsible for [Prop 29](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0xde53e95d97d4c5660423d33a75630a9fb89c85c7773c172f3df9e39dd3546cf2) ideation and execution.

![Gif](https://i.ibb.co/XkHvP5y/gifffffffff.gif)


| Social Media| 
| -------- | 
|[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/p/CoXNA24vXvW/)| 
|[SkateHive](https://skatehive.app/profile/willdias)|
|[Twitter](https://twitter.com/willdiasgnars/status/1609913222009700355/photo/1)|
|[ThatsGnarly](https://thatsgnar.ly/user/0xddb4938755c243a4f60a2f2f8f95df4f894c58cc)|




![](https://i.ibb.co/2gvJqZQ/will.gif)

I've been skateboarding for 27 years. I breath skateboarding from a performance art format through video art. 

I'm a self-taught artist, my relationship with skateboarding goes beyond tricks, I like to subvert the things that exists, like the noggle decks I've developed: a skateboard deck with the gnars logo, or the bodyboards and make it slide on hot asphalt, or even build a Gnars street spot in the heart of greater São Paulo.


![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/B1kG7vwfT.png)


## Wills History Record 

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BJK-rjAG6.png)

- 10 times dailydrop in thatsgnar.ly
- 5 video with various colors of noggle skateaboarding decks. 
- Participating in [social networks](https://www.instagram.com/p/Cpk7__NNwLq/,) of people with high engagement reach,
- Created the possibility for other people to create their cc0 noggle deck around the world  

[![](https://i.ibb.co/n7L66Lr/image.png)](https://vimeo.com/819916136)

## Nounish Creations


Using objects outside the skateboard, such as bodyboard
![](https://i.imgur.com/LCajLdx.gif)

[Uncharted Waves](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/edition/uncharted-waves-will-dias1068)

It brings me immense pleasure to be part of the vibrant artistic community that is Gnars DAO. Throughout our prior collaboration, I've forged a strong bond with the community, I'm looking forward to engage even further and bring my artistic ideas to life. Crafting pieces that authentically embody my vision alongside Gnars has been a source of satisfaction. 

> ## *"I'm excited to continue crafting and cultivating unconventional projects and concepts that transcend the ordinary" - Will Dias*


Thanks to Gnars I was able to hold an event in which we celebrated with the Uncharted Waves Premier video - for the "NounGnarversary" event. The event was fully DIY and also brought a skateboarding obstacle called "Possibilities" for the community.



![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ByOImLFNp.png)




[NounGnarversary](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/edition/uncharted-waves-premier-noungnarversary8962)

---

# Making further Impact 

I want to be a DAO spearhead advocating on Gnars behalf and ensure the Organisation goals. Since we are all aligned to Million Shredders On chain I want to distribute 100 exclusive Gnars Skateboard Decks among new community members, tagged with QR codes that will lead to an Onboarding process into Gnars DAO.


I want to support Mera, SoMa, Bless with money and boards ( functional mkt material). The idea is start from the base skateboard school to SoMa and Bless partnership, both grass roots Skate Shops that goes beyond producing art and content. They should be managed personally by me and my trusted partners from the mentioned projects. 

This proposal, if passed, would fund 100 Skateboard DECKS and its art creations (though prophouse curation) that would be given to the institutions along with the sum of 500 USD donation for each one. 

In addition to the skateboard decks and donations this proposal compensates Will Dias with 2 ETH (equivalent in USDC) + 3 Gnars NFTs, for the proposal execution, communication with partners and onboarding, also in recognition and support for Wills efforts as a Gnars member. It also ensures that Will will be able to dedicate himself to Gnars during this proposal execution time.

# Who are the partners ?

## [Ionir Mera](https://www.instagram.com/ionirmera/) 

---

|![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmahDmksKDAtsyQ1xaAJaZxbQMpMYgFdkTp57kguC52zx2?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)  | OG skateboarder from Rio, made history competing tournaments and making skateboarding videos for major national media. Skativist for 23 years and instructor since 2012 acting for social projects with students and children in need.  | 
| -------- | -------- | 
| ![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmfW1YeUNYSFdTRWyLevNWrBmViSZr63LGw4pV5tB84EJ4?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)|**Mera uses his own methodology to teach techniques and culture. Mera is very respected around the scene and will be one of my trusted Gnarly Decks distributor.**|


## [Soma Skate Arte](https://somaskatearte.com/pages/sobre-a-soma)

---

| ![](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0024/4767/1355/files/logo_a_mao2-01_large.gif?v=1524601545) | SoMa is more than the best local Skate Shop, Soma has been  supporting alone the whole skateboarding scene of the city of Petropolis-RJ. | 
| -------- | -------- | 
|![](https://i.ibb.co/s2TWNTn/ezgif-com-video-to-gif.gif)|**SoMa does from audio-visual content, musical events, art exhibitions to several other events directly related to urban culture and its representation since 2012. SoMa will be other Gnarly Decks distribution channel.**|

---

## [Bless SkateShop](https://www.instagram.com/blessskateshop_)

---

|![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HyHgzLHEp.png) |Bless Skateshop was established in 2012 in São Paulo's Santana neighborhood and actively supports the local skateboarding culture.  |
|-|-|
|![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/B1t-z8SEa.png)|**They recently contributed to Gnarversary event success and have been dedicating efforts on building a community for skateboarders to connect, learn, and flourish through events and social initiatives. Additionally, they're involved in the DIY project at Sopa de Letras Square.**|

---
 
## Execution Plan: 

1. Create a prop house to reward **5 Designers** with **0.1 ETH** for **5 cc0  decks designs**
2. **Fabricate** Decks  applying awarded designs
3. **Prepare** QR code destination website optimized for **gnars onboarding**
4.  **Co-create** a best trick/event/diy/task/contest/thatsgnarly/obstacle/whatever in order to distribute/activate the 500 Donation budget with each partner together and distribute the decks according with what we created 
5. **Execute** planned actions along with, Mera, Soma and Bless in order to donate decks and onboard participants
6. **Showcase** Wills Gnarly films and Gnars Tools in mentioned Events like prop. 15 with Bob Burnquist.
7. **Decorate** Skateshops and Institution with Noggles Boards and place tons os stickers and paper Noggles from prop. 20.
8. **Activate** content created in TG and medias with Media Party

| Will Compensation|4000 USDC + 3 Gnars | 20 Decks
|Stickers  | 100 USD | Stickers
|Mera's School |500 USD + 1 Gnar| 20 Decks
|Soma Skate Arte|500 USD + 1 Gnar| 20 Decks
|Bless's SkateShop| 500 USD + 1 Gnar| 20 Decks
|Gnarthletes to be managed by Shredders Party (POD)| - | 20 Decks
|Decks |2700 USD|
|Prop House| 0.5 ETH | - | 
|100 Paper Noggles| - |- |
|**TOTAL**| |**8300 USD + 0.5 ETH**

> - Each Deck costs 27 USD each x 100 DECKs : 2700 USD 
> - Every Used Deck is a potencial Noggle Board ⌐◨-◨
> - There will no Distribution costs for the Decks once they will be distributed in RJ and SP 
> - I am pretty sure that creative ways of distribution, content delivery, onboarding adn etc will come up when working together with the mentioned entities.
> - Wills Compensation will also cover transportation costs to visit those projects to make onboard and skate 
> - This proposal takes time (months) to be executed wills compensation will enable him to keep working with and for Gnars 
> - Gnars Transfers will be required by multisig transactions

title: Let's Get This Party Started
description:
# Let's Get This Party Started

![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafybeicsgsgjl2owwws4fgz3x3ifjupoavto37kebp7jkywwz2ydlbhgde)

Let's deploy some parties so our pods can go fast and have fun. BRAAHP!!

📝 *NOTE: This proposal was originally written to include deployment of 3 parties for the tech, media and community pods. During transaction simulation I kept running into an error when more than one party deployment transaction was attached. So this proposal instead deploys a single admin party than can be used to deploy others rapidly while maintaining the onchain provenance.*

## What is a Party?

[Party](https://party.app) is the best way to create a group on Ethereum. Gather members, vote on decisions, and experience Ethereum in multiplayer. In the context of a DAO, a Party is "like a [fighter jet](https://twitter.com/john_c_palmer/status/1724239453097472152) taking off from your aircraft carrier."

![](https://devnet.irys.xyz/g88bflACl3HYkmoXYgVmyepEcrPTLysWDeRhFcCL4eA)

[HYPΣR](https://www.party.app/party/0x4d9Fec954076C3BF2A3a886F2d8E23C91D2990Fd) have been working closely with [John Palmer](https://twitter.com/john_c_palmer) and the Party team, who've been so kind to roll out new features at our request. They will soon be adding [Zora Network](https://zora.energy/) support, so as we prepare for [Gnars L2 migration](https://nouns.wtf/vote/382), all the pieces are falling into place.

## Who's at the Party?

This proposal will deploy an admin party with initial settings as shown below. While we are still on mainnet, this party can be used to rapidly deploy others, like the first 3 planned below, and adequately maintain onchain provenance. Once we have migrated to Zora Network where gas is negligible, we can deploy as many as we like from onchain proposals.

### Admin Pod (deployed by this proposal)

Gnars Admin Party comprises members who are already familiar with Party, will be assigned `admin.gnars.eth` and trusted with deploying other parties. 

![](https://devnet.irys.xyz/ZHNp961cILKWbfpSwVqDXfNKb2oND21N7j46wvyZH7I)

Hosts will be able to invite other members, and through voting, these groups will be able to vote on new members as required. Various members have been left off each intentionally, so we can use their additions as Party practice.

### Tech Pod (to be deployed by admin pod)

Gnars Tech Party is a curated group of technical contributors, whose Party will be assigned `tech.gnars.eth` and trusted with a suitable operating budget. As a group they will disburse funding as required, drop commemorative mints for software releases, and perhaps even deploy smart contracts as a group.

![](https://devnet.irys.xyz/vG_FpRO0nYYVwHPkLFjk-jLxKZ1W8n8FwGPfL4gi-Cg)

### Media Pod (to be deployed by admin pod)

Gnars Media Party is a select group of media curators, whose Party will be assigned `media.gnars.eth` and trusted with a suitable operating budget. As a group they will disburse funding as required, mint editions to Gnars Media House, and perhaps even deploy entirely new collections.

![](https://devnet.irys.xyz/6IfTcT54TivnNX-P3nfyQi3ZkRdEY2ikQMbUpYErcBg)

### Community Pod (to be deployed by admin pod)

Gnars Social Party is a select group of community leaders, whose Party will be assigned `social.gnars.eth` and trusted with a suitable operating budget. As a group they will disburse funding as required, host community calls, manage socials, and even publish onchain media like newsletters and podcasts.

![](https://devnet.irys.xyz/ictMHkySREnYUONMLUI6c6Q4z_IqfPsAoUG9TDycFnw)

All parties are intended to receive funding mentioned in later proposals and can do just about everything that can be done with a regular wallet. Except as a group, fully onchain, and in a much nicer experience than a multisig. Like mentioned earlier; they're gnarly fighter jets. 


## Why do we Party?

Our onchain story is everything, an immutable trail of provenance that lives on forever, that we can draw on to create any number of experiences. Party allows us to operate in trusted pods without all the frictions of full fledged DAO governance, for more agile and less cumbersome operations.

![](https://devnet.irys.xyz/xEf6JvfCPjQfD2sc1Cl8uY0eZDQGZletNjMkNfTKJoM)

Unlike multisigs, all actions in a Party are onchain, so there's additional gas costs in comparison. But I think it makes sense to subsidise those expenses in funding allocated to each Party's members. But this will only be required for a short time until we've migrated Gnars to Zora Network, and since Party will be there too, our experiments will continue freely (they already support Base too).

## Party Time!

Let's get this party started by mobilising our tech pod to assist with migrations, empowering our media pod to mint all our productions, galvanising our community pod to bring us closer together, and start making history! 

![](https://devnet.irys.xyz/I-6vsJ0lbEQC3bKF68UuonNT5QMhek9x-TA0Wg1MxHQ)

Once we're on Zora Network, our operating costs will drop 95%, we'll be tightly integrated with [Builder](https://nouns.build/) protocol, taking a more positive-sum approach, and we'll bring a million shredders onchain in no time!

*NOTE: This proposal deploys 1 party. The intended deployment of 3 parties from 1 proposal was replaced with the deployment of an admin party. This is due to an error encountered when trying to attach more than 1 party deployment transaction from a single proposal. Admin party will deploy other parties as required to maintain onchain provenance.*

title: DHNOUNS DAO  Funding 2023-2024
description:
# DHNOUNS DAO  Funding 2023-2024

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmcUAKkQf44GLssT4iwwrZwKSzvn2ycA8hj7nRz7i7oLpy)

Hello Gnars community,

We, DHnouns, are reaching out to request your support. We would like to request the addition of a total of 3 ETH + 2 GNARS to our DH Nouns Treasury. This funding will help us do more exciting things together.

### Use of Funds:

The requested funds will be used to build and demonstrate that the project will be sustainable in the future by executing a 6-month plan. During this period, we will have decentralized video contests, support for in-person events, support for athletes, and community entrepreneurial initiatives. We will use the funds to bootstrap the DH Nouns DAO treasury, governed on Snapshot.

**DAO on the platform**:

<https://thatsgnar.ly/dhnouns/dao>

Learn here what DHnouns vision and history is: <https://thatsgnar.ly/dhnouns/stories/thatsgnarly-14-895621>

Communication channel: <https://www.instagram.com/dhnouns/>

Content channel created for the community: <https://www.instagram.com/dhnouns_creations/>

General chat and conspiracy: <https://chat.whatsapp.com/BjkLOfFJCmz6vuoTvdF77Q>

### How will the funds be distributed?

All of the 3 ETH will go into the DH Nouns treasury, a new onchain DAO built on top of the [thatsgnar.ly](http://thatsgnar.ly) platform. The funds will be governed by the DH Nouns community. Until we make the move to our onchain treasury - the DAO funds will be held in a Safe and governed by a Snapshot space.

2 GNARS will be awarded as prizes to dedicated athletes committed to their WEB3 education and participation in the DAO, connecting them with the GNARS family and great career opportunities. This discussion will take place publicly in the DAO's idea and proposal spaces, with careful consideration of merit.

### Maintenance and Social Media/Network Announcements:

We are reserving 0.3 ETH for Rocketman and DCOT, who will promote DH Nouns throughout the season. These funds will be used to keep our platform running smoothly and to create advertisements to spread the word about what we are doing. They have been doing a great job managing our social media, advertisements, and platform maintenance, and they are major sponsors of the community, having invested in community drops and the treasury, laying the foundation for this amazing community.

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmTeZdJ75paoBcU8eCgH9m7K4ydq1yKmiHr62q3DjKVK5d)

### Video Contests:

We want to organize three online video contests to engage more people in our community, uniting downhill enthusiasts from different parts of the world and bridging connections with different stores in Colombia, Brazil, and Venezuela, where our community is based. There will also be USD prizes.

Purchase of items for prizes for the first two events:

**VIDEO CONTEST #1 (most creative vertical video, with downhill spirit, art narrative edition)**

\* 0.03: 2 sets of DH wheels by LEBEN BOARD COMPANY

\* 0.02: 1 set of freeride wheels by LEBEN BOARD COMPANY

\* 0.02: 1 pair of PUCKS gloves by DONAS PUCKS

\* 0.02: 1 set of kneepads

\* 0.03: 4 t-shirts + stickers designed by fuzzyface.eth

\* 0.04: Shipping of prizes

**VIDEO CONTEST #2 (technica video the best adrenaline tricks in any format)**

\* 0.2 : USD prizes for 1st place (-- USD), 2nd place (-- USD), and 3rd place (-- USD)

**VIDEO CONTEST #3 (video result of community discussion)**

Prizes to be determined based on the results of the first round of video contests X2. Resources for the prizes will be requested in the DAO discussion spaces.

The allocation of resources will be in the hands of the DHnouns community DAO, which will propose ideas or initiatives to enhance the experience in this third event.

We invite the GNARS community to come together, participate in discussions, voting, and comments.

### Goals

\* To have a healthy and sustainable treasury that promotes sports, responsible practices, and sports and technology education for extreme athletes.

\* To build a supportive community that provides opportunities and mutual support to athletes worldwide in a decentralized family that loves gravity sports.

Supporting Multiple Athletes: If we have one or more committed athletes in our community, we would love to sponsor their trips to major competitions, putting the GNARS DAO and DHnouns name on the podiums of important events. We fully intend to promote community participation in the World Roller Skate Games, knowing that it's not easy for Latin American athletes. This will be a significant achievement for the entire community. This discussion will take place in the DAO space, and the athlete will need to propose and present their needs.

### Looking to the Future:

In about six months, we plan to request additional funding for projects that emerge within the community, strengthening our long-term vision. We will keep everyone informed and share more details, providing transparency to the community using the discussion spaces of the DAO on the platform \[[thatsgnar.ly/dhnouns/dao](http://thatsgnar.ly/dhnouns/dao)] as a space for development, incubation, and transparency.

In conclusion, we are confident that these funds will make our community stronger and more vibrant. With your support, we can achieve so much more together. Thank you for considering our proposal. We are excited about what the future holds for DH Nouns and Gnars!

Warm regards, DCOT, aka fuzzyface.eth On behalf of the DH Nouns community

My mind never stops thinking about new creations and also about creating together with the community that is gnars.

Throughout our prior collaboration, I've forged a strong bond with the community, eager to engage further and bring my artistic ideas to life. Crafting pieces that authentically embody my vision alongside Gnars has been a source of immense satisfaction. title: Lo-Fi Noggles Tax Reimbursement
description:
# Lo-Fi Noggles Tax Reimbursement

Hey, everyone! [JP](https://twitter.com/eusou_jp) here 🤘

Nouns in Rio received 1000 Lo-Fi Noggles from Klim, thanks to the approval of [Proposal #334](https://nouns.wtf/vote/334). Of these, 300 will go for the Gnars community here in Rio. However, upon arrival in Brazil, we encountered a tax of 2,198.60 Brazilian reais, which we’ve already covered. This proposal aims to reduce a portion of this cost.

![](https://i.imgur.com/89A9Ets.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/ecAexbb.jpg)

## Division
We've allocated the Noggles based on requests from the community and sub-communities. We're submitting a [proposal](https://nounsbr.wtf/vote/9) to NounsBR, suggesting they cover 70% of the tax. Simultaneously, we kindly request that Gnars contribute to cover the remaining 30% of the tax since 30% of the Noggles are destined for the Gnars community in Rio (300 units).


## Costs
Of the tax, 30% amounts to 659.58 Brazilian reais, approximately 0.09 ETH. Additionally, we've considered 2 shipments with an average cost of 40 reais, totaling 80 reais or 0.01 ETH. Thus, NounsBR will contribute 0.25 ETH, and **Gnars will contribute 0.1 ETH** toward covering the expenses.

## Considerations

The values have been converted based on the exchange rate as of 19/10/23. Shipments are scheduled for the coming weeks, and future requests can be made to the Nouns in Rio team, subject to availability. Thank you!

title: Proposal to Increase the reserve price in the NFT Auctions on gnars.wtf
description:
# Proposal to Increase the reserve price in the NFT Auctions on gnars.wtf 

# TL;DR

**Experiment increasing reserve price by 0.01 ETH**



# Intro
Currently, the minimum bid for NFT auctions on gnars.wtf is set at 0.01ETH. While this has allowed for affordable bidding, we have noticed instances where valuable NFTs have not received bids that truly reflect their value. By raising the minimum bid, we seek to address this issue and encourage participants to bid more accurately, benefiting the DAO and its collectors.


## Reasons for increase:


### 1. Improving Long-Term Sustainability: 

A higher minimum bid should result in increased revenues for gnars.wtf. These funds will strengthen the platform's treasury, supporting community initiatives, events, grants etc. 


### 2.Strengthening the Treasury:

Currently the success of gnars and popularity of the dao's proposals, the treasure outs happens faster then treasure ins. Unabling us to support people, places and things as the current demand. Increasing the reserve price should helpes us to attend this demand better.


### 3.We had increase the benefits of the Gnar Token 

Originally 1 Gnars = 1 Vote on the dao. Nowadays when you purchase a Gnar you get the vote and you get an extra Gnar HD, plus X votes in Thatsgnarly and more gating priviledges then before.


## Extra arguments 

- Due to high gas costs of bidding, bidders likely don't care whether the minimum bid is 0.01 or 0.02
- Most gnars sell for at least 0.02 ETH already according to etherscan

### Transaction

This proposal will set ReservePrice from '10000000000000000' to '20000000000000000' 

This will make the inicial auction price raises to 0.02 ETH.
