title: Skate to Glory at the Red Bull Bowl Rippers!
description:
# Skate to Glory at the Red Bull Bowl Rippers!

I'm **Kevin Kowalski**, a Pro Skater hailing from the vibrant streets of Portland, Oregon. With a following of over 60k on Instagram, I've not only made waves with my skills on the board but also as an entrepreneur with my label, "Portal Dimension."

My journey in the world of skateboarding has led me to unique opportunities, and now, a golden ticket beckons - I've been honored with an exclusive invite to the Red Bull Bowl Rippers in Marseille. Yet, I need your backing to seize this opportunity.

---

## Objective
Seeking 2 ETH to sponsor my trip to Red Bull Bowl Rippers, the invite-only skateboarding competition in Marseille, France.

---

## Event Details
📍 **Location**: Bowl Du Prado, Marseille, France
🗓 **Date**: September 1-3

---

## Why This Matters
1. **Prestige**: This is an invite-only event, showcasing top talents in the skateboarding world. My participation accentuates the level of skill and dedication I bring to this sport.
2. **Visibility**: With a live stream, filmers, and photographers at the event, there's significant exposure potential with global visibility.

---

## What Gnars DAO Gets
1. **Branding**: I'll proudly display the Gnars logo and/or noggles on my skateboard, ensuring it gets prime visibility. The Gnars sticker won't just be on my board; it'll be in every jump, flip, and trick I perform.
2. **Acknowledgment**: Listing Gnars as one of my official sponsors can spotlight it on the event's big screen,  creating a strong association between Gnars and premier skateboarding events.
3. **Shout-outs**: Any interviews or features will prominently include my appreciation for Gnars' support, amplifying the brand's connection with grassroots sports talents.
4. **Sticker Distribution**: To further the Gnars brand, I'll distribute some cool Gnars stickers amongst fans and contestants, weaving Gnars into the fabric of the skate competition community.

---

## The Need
Being from the US, the costs associated with traveling to France for this competition are substantial. Your support will be instrumental in ensuring my participation and in bringing our shared vision and passion for extreme sports to a global audience.

This proposal doesn't just fund a trip; it propels a dream and cements Gnars DAO as a pivotal supporter of skateboarding talent. It's more than just counting miles, but forging milestones and making history together.

---

## In Conclusion
Skateboarding is more than a sport; it's a way of life, a journey we embrace together. By partnering with me for this prestigious event, Gnars DAO showcases its commitment to grassroots talents and the true ethos of skateboarding.

As I represent Gnars DAO on this grand stage, together we won't just participate — we'll dominate. Let's ride with passion, champion the spirit of skateboarding alongside Red Bull, and carve our legacy on the global stage.

Here's to making this more than just an event but a monumental chapter in our shared history.

---

Thanks for yur time and consideration!
Kevin Kowalski 🛹
```

title: Gnars Media House
description:
# Gnars Media House

![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafybeihe3sifdtqr35endgdvwhfcjrtrohtuezyzumg7dmtysuysn6o7ty)

Gnars is a DAO, an onchain collective, a headless brand, a metalabel, and whatever else the community deems it to be. Open source and CC0, it's essentially what you make it. Now we're also a fully fledged "nounish dao" it's time we had our own media house onchain. 

Inspired by the [Factory Records catalog](https://www.metalabel.xyz/magazine/features/five-creative-lessons-from-factory-records), we are proposing an ERC1155 contract to which we can mint our productions as part of a dedicated NFT collection ([see Nouns Short Shorts](https://zora.co/collect/eth:0xd64ce3231839fed12c0ee132d6b33b4238ff9929)) that grows with us. Timed perfectly, [Haris Housos](https://www.instagram.com/haris_housos) has recently completed GNARS'ly, the first skate video part we've ever funded ([offchain proposal 21](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x31d9113448e4dc06cf86cb8b2d94681297769fbe6cde158c24745c7eaf0f1b62)) with his filmer [Andy Haroupias](https://www.instagram.com/andreas_haroupias/). 

We are releasing it as the first Gnars Media House mint as part of this proposal. As far as we know, this is the first ever skateboarding part sponsored by a DAO and premiered as an NFT drop. The onchain era has arrived and we're making history, together.

The release coincides with [NounGnarversary](https://prop.house/gnars/noungnarversary) celebrations.

*[Watch Trailer Here](https://thatsgnar.ly/creations/haris-housos-gnarsly-part-trailer)*

## A few words from Haris

After the Gnars community voted FOR the GNARS'ly video part proposal, me and my filmer Andy travelled to lots of different cities around Greece and filmed clips at spots even Greek skaters haven't seen before!

![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafybeieiqav4fwxz3rzklyz5incaonpke2pzbfhn7sdmonbum6apzdnopi)

Our goal was not to deliver a super heavy video part full of "hammers" but instead showcase the beauty of Greece via Andreas' lenses and my spot selection, as well as my skateboarding creativity!

After 7 months of non-stop filming we're ready to present you the GNARS'ly video part and we are very happy with the final result!

## Release details

Type: Open Edition

Link to mint: [gna.rs/mh-one](https://gna.rs/mh-one)

Collection: Gnars Media House
Description: Official release catalog for Gnars DAO

Token name: GNARS'ly
Description: Haris Housos video part for Gnars DAO

Attributes:
- Shredder: Haris Housos
- Discipline: Skateboarding
- Format: Video

Price: 0.01 ETH
Start date: 8 Aug 2023 at 1am UTC
End date: TBA (until DAO decides)

Split address:
TBA

Gnars Treasury (50%):
0xa1B74d2280966A89AC7e0F3A8bc5f0867C776d98

Haris Housos & Andy Haroupias (50%):
0x761b4763a572010f96Ed7c22011D0C95E2b36693

*Default admin will be set temporarily to `vote.gami.eth` and changed to Gnars treasury once everything is confirmed to be working as expected.*

title: Tom's Tutorials
description:
# Tom's Tutorials

![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafybeigpjunkcajdbltbqhrbsxhssyqeqarcslvz7pumyjg7ogw3pd5xlq)

**Requesting 4.2069 ETH** for Tom Rohrer to promote Gnars through his 10 MILLION+ view skateboarding tutorial channels as his official pro model board sponsor. 

Funding includes *3 ETH* for six months sponsorship and *1 ETH* to fund an infinite Prop House round *(5 x 0.2 ETH prizes)* for community designed skate deck graphics. Tom will also release his new video part with Gnars branding and as a collaborative NFT droposal.

An additional *0.2069 ETH* will cover manufacture and shipping of 5 boards so Tom has one of each of the first 5 winning designs to feature in his videos.

## ⚡️ TLDR

**Gnars welcomes Tom Rohrer:**

- Six months as channel AND board sponsor (3 ETH)
- An infinite Prop House round for board designs (1 ETH)
- Five skate decks manufactured and shipped (0.2069 ETH)
- Blank Deck project for ongoing design drops (no cost)
- New video part as an NFT droposal (no cost, soon)

## 💸 Six Month Sponsorship

Tom Rohrer is a professional skateboarder from San Diego, California. He's known for his extensive catalog of flat land tricks and has [previously been sponsored by Gnars DAO](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0xbefdbdf326b35137ef79bb73d67f623fb748e557a78d3c1288f2179620a6d15c) for 3 ETH total. We were very fortunate to be introduced to Tom by the legend Dave Bachinsky.

Since our initial 3 ETH sponsorship, Tom has been giving back to the skateboarding community through his tutorial videos. And as far as I'm concerned, resources such as these are *public goods!* 

- [Tutorials Instagram (77.2k)](https://www.instagram.com/toms_tutorials/)
- [Personal Instagram (15.2k)](https://www.instagram.com/tom_rohrer/)
- [YouTube channel (16k)](https://www.youtube.com/c/TomsTutorials1)
- [TikTok account (27.2k)](https://www.tiktok.com/@toms.tutorials)

He has garnered **OVER 10 MILLION VIEWS** riding Noun 189 x Gnars decks that I donated via our [Boardpusher](https://www.boardpusher.com/) partnership. Turns out they've got some of the best pop of any board Tom has ever ridden and he rates them highly!

![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafybeiggjrk7jjrllgeacoghf45rn23icx7tjmgfhryg52ybqdxupwszhq)

So to welcome Tom back to Gnars with a bang, I'm proposing we provide him with another 3 ETH sponsorship and 0.2069 ETH to purchase custom decks. As well as 2 pairs of Nouns Vision and 2 Gnars NFTs, to split between himself and his amazing wife who films all his tutorials!

> // *Nouns Vision and Gnars NFT request [via Snapshot](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth) to follow*

Additionally, I'd like to use the remaining 1 ETH to fund an infinite [Prop House](https://prop.house/gnars) round for community sourced custom skate deck designs. More info below...

## 🏠 Prop House Round

The infinite Prop House round is designed to award 5 winning artists with 0.2 ETH each for CC0 custom pro model board designs. Tom will ride them in upcoming tutorial videos and showcase our community artists to his huge (and growing) audience. 

![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafkreidc4tuqzhlcqj7enm7goon2ruposcmara7qameyworxpw5jwkgl7e)

Best of all, artists won't have to take the upfront risk normally associated with funding rounds of this kind. Instead they'll submit concept sketches for what they plan to create, along with their portfolio of existing work, and a general idea of the planned colour palette to use.

![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafkreidedz6oqdy3ty6tlvk4dygmxp4y6yxld3vcbkh7rbcjmqfvwr2mlu)

Prop House allows us to run infinite rounds that are not bound specifically by time, instead allowing for a quorum to be set so that once a voting threshold is reached, the proposing artist gets funded. Eventually, provided we top up the funds, I can see this working as part of an ongoing "Blank Deck project" of which I touch on in the next section.

## 🔥 Blank Deck Project

[Blank CD](https://zora.co/collect/eth:0x5d5b75dde691983e458eb0fb53146b46506a987d/1) is a new conceptual art project I've been working on in collaboration with artist friends, first of whom are musicians. Similar to the "Blank Canvas" concept that birthed [Art Haus DAO](https://art.haus), and the Opepen format by Jack Butcher and co, Blank Deck draws inspiration from far and wide.

![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafkreiexs6efnf7vvrk7uf4uypfrfm72xciv66a2hevqof3l7g2m7kptqa)

Blank Deck is essentially the provision of an open edition, forever, that can be burned to redeem an ongoing series of artist collabs limited by either time, supply, or both. The concept is in its early stages, but I am experimenting with Blank CD as we use the "CD Burner" to collect artist collabs, which we can later personalise with custom cover art inserts and more.

## 🎥 Video Part Release

Finally, to round out a warm Gnars welcome to our good friend Tom Rohrer, we will prepare his new video part for release, via an NFT droposal. Below is an example of a previous video part he did with The Berrics (click to watch).

[![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafkreicosguxdjfb77dth5tmpxdxowod6n75vnbsprtffk7gpj2bpafndm)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=37Qay9oKNBk)

The release is still being discussed, but as with any NFT droposal, mint proceeds will be split between the artist (Tom) and the Gnars DAO treasury. Super excited about the potential for skate media coverage of Tom's new part!


## 🗳 Thank You Voters!

Our continued work with Tom will help us reach more skaters, educate many of them on what we do, and ensure we are well positioned to learn from Tom's many years in pro skateboarding. I'm really excited for what this collaboration can mean for our onboarding efforts and look forward to over delivering on our promises together!

title: Meier Skatepark Renovation + ever last Gnart Installation
description:
# Meier Skatepark Renovation + ever last Gnart Installation


![](https://i.ibb.co/SsCSsgZ/image.png)

## Meier Skatepark History 

Meiers local miniramp has been around since 1997 and has been the nest of the true underground scene of Rio de Janeiro skateboard.


| ![](https://i.ibb.co/C7WZBSg/meier.gif) | ![](https://i.ibb.co/MCyQL9D/image.png) | 
| -------- | -------- | 
 
 

## Current state of the ramp

Nowadays, the ramp presents, holes, cracks, rusty on the pipes, and deformations in its curves, the whole area is not being taking care by the public forces.

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SkH-diiun.png)

> RIO - Two months ago, administrative agent Ana Paula Santos sadly witnesses the degradation of the Skate Park in Méier. The favorite spot for skaters - who used to have fun on the ramp, a landmark in the northern zone of Rio - has now become home to homeless people and stage suspicious activities. The park's playground equipment has been turned into support for an improvised tent made of a cloth, as shown in the photo sent to Eu-Repórter. Accustomed to radical maneuvers, the skate park has become a clothesline.

> It started with litter, but now there are nearly ten people living in the park. Minors go there to consume crack. The children who attend a nearby school, who used to take a shortcut through the park, now have to go around it. It has become extremely dangerous. Skaters even tried to revitalize it. One resident painted the skate park, but...

GLOBO (MAJOR NEWSMEDIA)

![](https://i.ibb.co/brxmfmf/image.png)

## [Location](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Roda+Cultural+Do+Méier+CCRP/@-22.8998244,-43.2810754,3a,38.2y,137.64h,91.93t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1s34_pS7Pljr7nnOCSwu9kWw!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fpanoid%3D34_pS7Pljr7nnOCSwu9kWw%26cb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile.gps%26w%3D203%26h%3D100%26yaw%3D119.29314%26pitch%3D0%26thumbfov%3D100!7i16384!8i8192!4m9!3m8!1s0x997d68c0e6564f:0xa12177e0956d6ef6!8m2!3d-22.8999107!4d-43.2809035!10e5!14m1!1BCgIgARICCAI!16s%2Fg%2F11mqw0f1p_!5m2!1e1!1e4?entry=ttu) 



### We are going to rename the plaza after a beloved skateboard local hero [Jadson Brian](https://cemporcentoskate.elav.tmp.br/fiksperto/o-adeus-do-skate-carioca-a-jadson-brian-o-jb/)

The local community wishs to refurbish and renew the whole venue in honor to the memory of the local skater Jadson Brian for sometime now, and this is the perfect opportunity to make this dream come tru;

> "In addition to being a great reference in skateboarding, Jadson was also greatly loved at NES (Skateboard School Center), where he worked as a teacher for over 15 uninterrupted years. He brought the true love and spirit of skateboarding to a legion of children, teenagers, and adults in his fun and popular skateboarding classes. Children consider him an idol and a friend, as do all the parents and participants of the project.
> JB was responsible for the development of great names in skateboarding in Rio de Janeiro, both within the school and beyond. He worked as a coach alongside promising talents from the base categories of skateboarding in Rio de Janeiro."

ref: https://cemporcentoskate.elav.tmp.br/fiksperto/o-adeus-do-skate-carioca-a-jadson-brian-o-jb/


## Project 

We are going to renew the whole square, clean, destroy, rebuild, clean again and paint so we can have a great inauguration and celebration in august. 

![](https://i.ibb.co/smf16cb/RAMPA-MEIER.jpg)

> Steel Plate with QR CODE pointing to explanatory landing page 

![](https://i.ibb.co/Vg3H4M6/NOGGLES-TRANSP.png)
> Tile Art

![](https://i.ibb.co/G75Nnmr/image.png)
> Mosaic Paint in the floor

### Ramp Fix 

- New ramp floor (concrete over concrete)
- Renew LightSpots 
- Build ramp extension


### Painting and Grafitti

- Jadson Brian Graffiti+ art attack with names of underground art
- Tiles art Noggles on the wall ⌐◨-◨ 

### Bringing life and refresh vibes to the whole square

Currently the venue is abandoned by the city but...

Every Wednesday, the square hosts the [Meier Rap Battle](https://www.instagram.com/rodaculturaldomeier/?igshid=Y2I2MzMwZWM3ZA%3D%3D), an energetic event that celebrates local Rap/Hip-Hop culture. This dynamic gathering has nurtured influential artists through thrilling rap battles. Allan "Marola," a dedicated regular at the square during its peak in the late 90s and early 2000s, both organizes and is a friend to local skaters.

The Meier Rap Battle and the Méier Ramp Movement (MRM) along with coletivo XV join forces to improve the space, uniting the realms of Hip-Hop and skateboarding. As part of their initiative, they are even planning to construct a skatable stage, aiming to further empower the scene.


## Prop House Grand Opening Event Proposal

With this proposal we are going to reburbish this ramp, and its effect will last for years, to launch this new bright phase for the **Jadson Brian Square** we want to create a celebration with gnarsversary therefore we are creating this matching proposal in prop.house so we can make a great party, with bands, films projection, best tricks and much more.

## Delivarables for Gnars 

- Fixed Gnarggles in the venue 
- Live onboarding during event (check prop.house proposal)
- Documentation and video production of the process , little pills + full minidoc

## Thatsgnarly contest 

In addition to our IRL best trick we want to create a contest in thatsgnarly where we are going to teach people how to use the app to join the contest 


## Request: 2.5 ETH  

PS: all will be spent in construction material, concrete , tiles , paint and equipment all budget and supervised by Pharra Buarque official Coletivo XV archtect

## History📜
Irven Oliveira, Born in the Complexo da Maré favela in Rio de Janeiro, began dancing in the street with his childhood friends inspired by a DVD of the legendary RedBull BC ONE 2005, Since then never stopped playing soccer for so unknown BREAKING, one day dancing with his friends in the street where they lived, some guys passed and saw that scene and stopped to observe, and automatically approached and minutes later were dancing along with Irven and his friends, who danced there and represented the purest BREAKING, the same way it was born in the african-american and latin communities in the United States in the 70s.

Irven meets local kids via breakdancing, then teaches them the basics of web3.

Check out this video of the kids in action:
[(https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GRD7Bdfp36Y](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GRD7Bdfp36Y)

His first competition was in 2013, at 11 years old. # Return 0.069 ETH to vote.gami.eth for testing

![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafkreigngu3o7fr4hm6ugspzo5dh4dt4ij3g3kwwuxhvrvi5qm7c3jnvai)

This the first proposal for our [new DAO executor](https://etherscan.io/address/0xa1b74d2280966a89ac7e0f3a8bc5f0867c776d98#code) contract. 

We thought it necessary to perform a final test with a small amount at stake. Doing so will bring peace of mind prior to migrating our [existing multisig treasury](https://etherscan.io/tokenholdings?a=0x0658f4ed17289144717713adffc2539ef7c2ef8e).

With [this transaction](https://etherscan.io/tx/0xc207fe7108d3d25001f5a8aea9cc50b2e297869f7daf858fce1cb53f46a2e2e1), I've transferred **0.069 ETH** to our [new treasury](https://etherscan.io/tokenholdings?a=0xa1b74d2280966a89ac7e0f3a8bc5f0867c776d98). Attached to this proposal is another transaction that will return the funds to my `vote.gami.eth` address.

Once executed we will initiate treasury migration.

Our onchain era has begun.

🤘
